# Context
This is a team portfolio website project for the SoftServe program.  
The website introduces our team members and contains individual profile pages.

# Tech Stack
- HTML5
- CSS3 (Vanilla)
- JavaScript (minimal, mostly for theme switching)

# Project Structure
- Each page is a separate HTML file
- Shared styles are stored in CSS files
- Components like Navbar should be reusable across pages

# Code Style & Rules
- Use semantic HTML5 tags (<header>, <nav>, <main>, <section>, <footer>)
- Use modern CSS (Flexbox, Grid)
- Follow consistent class naming (BEM or clear naming)
- Keep CSS in separate files (no inline styles)
- Write clean, readable, and maintainable code
- Ensure full responsiveness (mobile-first)

# UI/UX Guidelines
- Modern, clean, minimalistic design
- Consistent spacing, fonts, and colors
- Smooth transitions for interactions (hover, buttons, navbar)
- Keep visual consistency across all pages

# Content Rules (VERY IMPORTANT)
- DO NOT rewrite or remove existing text content
- DO NOT duplicate existing text blocks
- DO NOT insert placeholder text (like lorem ipsum)
- Only add new text if explicitly requested

# Modification Rules
- Do not break existing layout or structure
- Do not refactor unrelated parts of the code
- Only modify what is explicitly requested
- Preserve working code

# JavaScript Guidelines
- Use ES6+ syntax
- Keep JS minimal and modular
- Do not block page rendering
- Comment logic when necessary

# AI Assistant Guidelines
- Prioritize reusable components (especially Navbar)
- When updating pages, improve styling without breaking structure
- When unifying pages, match styles instead of rewriting content
